query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'esrs_datapoints' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'esrs_datapoints' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
code	varchar
esrs_standard	varchar
disclosure_requirement	varchar
paragraph	varchar
related_ar	varchar
name	text
data_type	varchar
conditional	tinyint
voluntary	tinyint
sfdr_mapping	varchar
created_at	timestamp
updated_at	timestamp
